steps.title: Identify the shared dynamic
steps.content: Both texts show consumer behavior changing and forcing music businesses to respond. Text 1 shows consumers wanting experiences, pushing festivals to adapt. Text 2 shows streaming adoption pushing musicians toward live revenue.

steps.title: Match this dynamic to the choices
steps.content:
The correct answer states this directly: changing consumer behaviors lead to music business changes.

The claims about subscription fees and live festivals, broader experiential-economy limits, and streaming demand add unsupported preferences or causation that the texts do not address. Choice B also incorrectly confines the experiential economy to music alone.

That confirms C is correct.
